_doc: Add an entry per image filename to set its title/caption/category/date and on-image text position. Files not listed here will use sensible defaults derived from the filename. Drop a new image into this folder and it will appear automatically on the next build.
_textPositionFormat: position.x and position.y accept any CSS length: '10%', '40px', or keywords 'left'|'center'|'right' (x) and 'top'|'middle'|'bottom' (y). align is 'left'|'center'|'right'.

window-watcher-kitten.jpg.title: Window Watcher
window-watcher-kitten.jpg.caption: Watching the world move while refusing to participate.

konti-future-billionaire.jpg.title: Future Billionaire
konti-future-billionaire.jpg.caption: Posing beside a small note of ambition.

regal-side-profile.jpg.caption: A long, soft side profile in flat morning light.

konti-downward-glance.jpg.title: Downward Glance
konti-downward-glance.jpg.caption: Studying the floor like it owes him money.

upside-down-face.jpg.title: Curious Inversion
upside-down-face.jpg.caption: From below — ears, whiskers, world flipped.

konti-corner-peek.jpg.title: Corner Peek
konti-corner-peek.jpg.caption: A face appears from the edge of the frame.

konti-close-calls.jpg.title: Macro · Eye
konti-close-calls.jpg.caption: An eye, in detail. Whiskers like glass thread.

konti-black-and-white.jpg.title: Black & White Alert
konti-black-and-white.jpg.caption: Eyes lit, ears up, body still.

window-stretch-silhouette.jpg.title: Window Stretch
window-stretch-silhouette.jpg.caption: Reaching toward the world through bars.

tall-watch-window.jpg.title: Tall Watch
tall-watch-window.jpg.caption: Eye on something only he can see.

looking-skyward.jpg.title: Looking Skyward
looking-skyward.jpg.caption: A bird, probably. Or nothing at all.

neon-throne-1.jpg.title: Neon Throne I
neon-throne-1.jpg.caption: Purple light, hammock chair, total composure.

sleepy-smile.jpg.title: Sleepy Smile
sleepy-smile.jpg.caption: Eyes shut, tiny smile, perfect peace.
